description: Scene sequencer -- routes manifest scenes to geometries, computes per-scene normalized time from the global frame/timestamp (absorbs per-scene time normalization from the virtualized clock), manages scene lifecycle (setup, active rendering, teardown), handles transition timing windows and overlap scheduling. Uses the transition contract (OBJ-008) to compute when scenes overlap.
notes: Tier 3 engine integration. Spec delivers SceneSequencer class with stateless planFrame(frame) method. Resolves OBJ-008 OQ-A (boundary conflict resolution). Fulfills OBJ-035 D13 deferral (transition easing). Uses independent single-phase fades (not OBJ-008 two-phase dip_to_black). Orchestrator integration contract specifies Phase A/C mapping.
